title: Memory viewer UI component
description: Create MemoryViewer component showing bounded memory stores (agent/user), frozen snapshots, and memory entries. Include add/remove/replace operations with confirmation gates.

title: Semantic search hooks
description: Implement useSemanticSearch hook wrapping /api/v1/memory/search endpoint. Support hybrid search (BM25 + embeddings), MMR reranking, temporal decay.

title: TTL semantics implementation
description: Add TTL (time-to-live) support to memory entries. Implement automatic expiration, TTL configuration per store type, and cleanup job.

title: Bounded memory visibility in UI
description: Extend existing BoundedMemory component with full CRUD operations, capacity indicators, consolidation triggers, and frozen snapshot viewer.

title: Indexer surface testable
description: Add integration tests for background indexer: chunking, embedding, indexing, search. Ensure indexer is observable with stats endpoint.

title: Memory consolidation UI
description: Add UI for memory consolidation: show consolidation candidates, approve/reject consolidation, view consolidation history.

title: Create Phase 5 runbook
description: Create runbook for memory incident response: search failures, indexer issues, consolidation problems. Include debug commands and escalation paths.

title: Update parity scorecard for Memory axis
description: Fill in parity scorecard for Memory axis: feature coverage, quality, observability, evidence. Mark status as completed.

title: Phase 5 gate review
description: Run gate review against criteria 5.1-5.5. Document results in phase5_gating.md. Get sign-off to proceed to Phase 6.
